name: RCI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, INC.
business: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. operates subsidiaries that offer live adult entertainment and high-quality dining experiences across 71 establishments in 15 states as of September 30, 2025. It also operates a leading business communications company serving the adult nightclubs industry through its Media Group.
sellsTo: adult nightclubs industry for media and events

exposures.sentence: We are exposed to risks related to cyber security and protection of confidential information, and failure to protect the integrity and security of payment card or individually identifiable information of our guests and employees or confidential and proprietary information of the Company could damage our reputation and expose us to loss of revenues, increased costs and litigation.

In addition, the rapid evolution and increased adoption of artificial intelligence technologies may also heighten our cybersecurity risks by making cyber-attacks more difficult to detect, contain, and mitigate.
We currently rely on third-party delivery providers for the ordering and payment platforms that receive guest orders and that send orders directly to our point-of-sale system.

catalysts.event: Launch of five-year Back-to-Basics strategy to improve performance of existing clubs and Bombshells units and achieve financial targets by fiscal 2029.
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, we launched our five-year Back-to-Basics strategy where we focus on improving performance of existing clubs and Bombshells units to fuel our capital allocation priorities.

catalysts.event: Financial targets for fiscal 2029: total revenues of $400 million, free cash flow of $75 million, and shares outstanding of 7.5 million.
catalysts.sentence: Our financial targets by fiscal 2029 are to achieve: Total revenues of $400 million Free cash flow of $75 million Shares outstanding of 7.5 million

catalysts.event: Repurchase of 821,000 shares of common stock from a single stockholder for $30.0 million.
catalysts.sentence: On November 21, 2025, the Company repurchased 821,000 shares of its own common stock from a single stockholder for $30.0 million, paid $8.0 million in cash and $22.0 million under a two-year unsecured promissory note.

tamClaims.claim: The 2,000 adult nightclubs of North America collectively have revenue in excess of $5 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Included in the Media Group is ED Publications, publishers of the bimonthly ED (Exotic Dancer) Magazine, the only national business magazine serving the 2,000 adult nightclubs of North America, which collectively have revenue in excess of $5 billion, according to the Association of Club Executives (an industry lobbying organization that was founded by ED Publications in 1999).
